message:
feat(wait): add convenience APIs and comprehensive tests (wa-upg.3.2)

Add wait_for_condition() and wait_for_condition_with_backoff() for
simpler boolean predicates without structured WaitFor returns.

Expand test suite from 3 to 18 tests covering:
- Backoff schedule with different factors
- Default backoff sanity check
- WaitError display format with all fields
- Predicate succeeding after N attempts
- Max retries exhaustion
- wait_for_value immediate success
- wait_for_condition success and timeout
- Quiescence state checks (no activity, pending work, window)
- QuiescenceState describe output
- WaitFor enum constructors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
